heading: Reviews; Other Actions Regarding Agreements
label: III Reviews; Other Actions Regarding Agreements
notes: CodificationThe designation “ III” was in the original “Subtitle C” and was editorially changed in order to conform the numbering format of this subtitle to the usages employed in the codification of the remainder of the Tariff Act of 1930 as originally enacted.Part
